/usr/bin/c++ --sysroot=/tools/xsdk-zynq-2024.1/sysroots/cortexa9t2hf-neon-xilinx-linux-gnueabi  -O2 -pipe -g -feliminate-unused-debug-types  CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/Ascan_v2_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/adddoctordialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/addlensdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/addpatientdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/calculatordialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/calibrationdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/doctordetaildialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/editdoctordialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/editlensdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/editpatientdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/homescreendialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/keypad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/measuredialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/numericpad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/patientdetaildialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/preferencesdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/printdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/promptdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/viewdoctordialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/viewlensdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/viewpatientdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/waveformdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/welcomedialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/Services/qcustomplot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Ascan_v2.dir/Ascan_v2_autogen/EWIEGA46WW/qrc_resource.cpp.o -o Ascan_v2  -Wl,-rpath,/home/amt-06/Desktop/Ascan_1: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Sql.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5PrintSupport.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Charts.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /home/amt-06/Desktop/Ascan_1/libiolcalc.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.3
